top_signals.title: Mexico City Pozole Chain Casa de Tono Explores Sale on Expansion Pitch
top_signals.summary: Mexican family-owned restaurant chain La Casa de Toño is seeking a sale in a deal that could top $400 million and set the business up for expansion, people familiar with the matter said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Southwest Beats Estimates on Strong Demand, Premium Spending
top_signals.summary: Southwest Airlines Co. provided an outlook for the full year that exceeded Wall Street’s projections, citing robust travel demand and spending on the carrier’s premium products.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Stocks Rise Late as Megacap Earnings Kick Off: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street investors sent stocks higher in late hours as traders sifted through results from megacaps for clues on whether their massive artificial-intelligence investments are paying off.
